name: Seared Scallops with Vegetable Confetti
recipeIngredient: Haricots verts, or regular green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables by cutting the haricots verts and scallions crosswise into 1/4-inch pieces. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Cut zucchini and bell pepper into 1/4-inch dice and add to the bean mixture.
3. In a saucepan, bring water and sugar to a boil. Blanch vegetables for 30 seconds in the sugar water, then drain in a sieve.
4. Stir together the vegetables, olive oil, salt, and pepper until cooled.
5. Prepare the scallops by removing any tough muscle from one side if necessary. Halve each scallop horizontally. Pat dry and season with salt and pepper.
6. Heat 1/2 tablespoon olive oil in a 10-inch skillet over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking. Arrange half of the scallops in the skillet without crowding them and sauté until golden and just cooked through, about 15 seconds on each side. Transfer scallops to a plate and keep warm.
7. Wipe the skillet clean and repeat with the remaining oil and scallops.
8. Add wine, butter, lemon juice, and any juices that have accumulated from the scallops in the plate to the skillet. Simmer, stirring and scraping up brown bits until reduced to about 1/4 cup.
9. Divide vegetables among 6 plates and top each serving with a scallop. Spoon sauce over each serving and sprinkle with chives.
